differential_diagnoses: Pulmonary veno-occlusive disease (PVOD) / Pulmonary capillary hemangiomatosis (PCH)
Connective tissue disease-associated pulmonary arterial hypertension (e.g., occult systemic sclerosis)
next_steps: Urgent referral for lung transplantation evaluation
Discontinue or significantly reduce vasodilator therapy due to clinical deterioration (risk of pulmonary edema)
Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations (strongly associated with PVOD/PCH)
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (looking for hemosiderin-laden macrophages or malignant cells)
Stabilize hemodynamics with judicious fluid management and potentially low-dose diuretics under expert supervision
Careful assessment of potential lung biopsy risks versus clinical benefit for definitive diagnosis
